notificationTemplates.name: Transaction Confirmation
notificationTemplates.template: Dear {{customerName}}, your {{type}} of {{currency}} {{amount}} has been processed. Ref: {{reference}}

notificationTemplates.name: Fraud Alert
notificationTemplates.template: ALERT: Suspicious activity detected on agent {{agentCode}}. Risk score: {{fraudScore}}/100. Reason: {{reason}}

notificationTemplates.name: KYC Approved
notificationTemplates.template: Congratulations {{agentName}}! Your KYC verification has been approved. You can now process transactions up to {{limit}}.

notificationTemplates.name: Rate Alert Triggered
notificationTemplates.template: {{baseCurrency}}/{{targetCurrency}} has reached your target rate of {{targetRate}}. Current rate: {{currentRate}}

notificationTemplates.name: Settlement Complete
notificationTemplates.template: Settlement batch {{batchId}} has been completed. Total: {{currency}} {{totalAmount}} across {{transactionCount}} transactions.

notificationTemplates.name: Commission Payout
notificationTemplates.template: Your commission of {{currency}} {{amount}} has been credited to your wallet. New balance: {{currency}} {{newBalance}}

notificationTemplates.name: Dispute Filed
notificationTemplates.template: A new dispute has been filed by {{customerName}} for transaction {{reference}}. Amount: {{currency}} {{amount}}. Please investigate within 48 hours.

notificationTemplates.name: System Maintenance
notificationTemplates.template: Scheduled maintenance on {{date}} from {{startTime}} to {{endTime}}. Some services may be temporarily unavailable.
